messages.content:
Review · pr · Standard · Pass class: closure-re-review · Escalation: Stayed targeted contextual (closure-re-review; whole-branch size ignored) · Pass: targeted contextual · Filing: merge-blockers only

**Depth:** Standard

Anti-thrash preflight: recovered ledger from `_agent/review/REVIEW_LEDGER.md`. Whole branch `main...HEAD` exceeds file-count Full thresholds (12+ scaffold modules + redirect), but latest fix commit only touches `redirect.ts` for prior theme `query-preservation`. Classified as closure-re-review. Size thresholds MUST NOT alone promote to Full — staying targeted contextual.

## Findings
No merge-blockers in scope.

## Baseline contradictions

| Theme | Prior synthesis | Fresh evidence | Action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| query-preservation | open | Narrow fix preserves query/hash and rejects absolute targets | close |

## Fix-loop ledger

| theme_id | invariant | surfaces | state | closure evidence | contradiction |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| query-preservation | login redirect keeps safe same-origin relative targets with query/hash | runtime, tests | closed | sweep checked empty, relative+query, absolute-reject | none |

### Sweep · `query-preservation`

- Symbols / APIs: `nextUrlAfterLogin`
- Matrix rows: empty, relative+query, absolute-reject

## Review synthesis
Large branch surface ignored for Full promotion; latest commit scope drove targeted lane.
